title: pteris angustata
intro: Pteris angustata is a species of fern, specifically a type of bracken fern, native to tropical Asia. Traditionally, Pteris angustata is used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, contributing to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Pteris angustata is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and made into capsules or tablets for oral consumption.
